allowed_implementation_feasibility_claim: The pipeline runs end-to-end on Kaggle/local staging data.

The implementation uses a staging manifest, candidate universe, GDN edge extraction, relation profiling, calibration, template rule generation, deterministic verification, runtime execution, evidence audit, and synthetic replay path.
Runtime response-missing behavior passes synthetic sanity replay for the two audited staging rules.
allowed_staging_only_evidence_claims: Support-aware slice selection resolves the initial support bottleneck for at least some predeclared pairs.
Two staging verified rules were audited as evidence cards.
TASK-020 found additional support-aware staging slices for the audited pair family, but this remains staging-only evidence.
prohibited_final_claims: Any claim that Kaggle/local staging results replace official iTrust evaluation.

task017.summary: Initial single-source Kaggle/local staging dry-run completed with zero verified rules due to normal-support bottleneck.

task018.summary: Support-aware slice selection found a staging slice that produced two verified template rules.

task019.summary: The two verified staging rules were reconstructed as evidence cards for human review.

task020.summary: Robustness scan and synthetic replay found additional support-aware staging slices and validated runtime missing-response behavior on non-SWaT synthetic mini-series.

next_recommended_path: Resolve DEC-007 with official iTrust data before any final benchmark or thesis performance claim.
Alternatively, prepare a professor-facing review package that clearly marks all current results as staging-only before final official data access.
report.report_statement: This is a Kaggle/local staging run for implementation debugging only. It is not an official SWaT benchmark result and must not be used as a final thesis performance claim.

risk_register.mitigation: Resolve DEC-007 before final evaluation claims.
risk_register.risk: Kaggle/local source is not official iTrust.

risk_register.mitigation: Use official iTrust route or professor-approved alternative before final benchmark.
Perform manual metadata review before final reporting.

risk_register.mitigation: Treat cards as staging evidence only; require official data and broader support before claims.
risk_register.risk: Support counts are still small in audited cards.

risk_register.mitigation: Report stability by pair, calibration ranges, and verifier status rather than assuming one fixed rule ID.
risk_register.risk: Rule IDs vary across slices due to calibration/provenance.

risk_register.mitigation: Do not claim anomaly detection performance from staging validation.
risk_register.risk: Validation runtime firing on staging data is zero.

risk_register.mitigation: Use replay only as runtime semantics sanity check.
risk_register.risk: Synthetic replay is non-SWaT plumbing only.
